summary: Reporter requests 16 KB page size alignment for libSkiaSharp.so on Android to comply with Google Play's Android 16+ requirements. This was already fixed in PR #3096 and backported to v3.116.1 (PR #3098) and v3.118.0-preview.2 (PR #3099).

bugSignals.errorMessage: libSkiaSharp.so has 4 KB page size, incompatible with Android 16+ requirement for 16 KB page size

stepsToReproduce: Create a .NET MAUI Android app targeting Android 16
Build AAB using SkiaSharp v2.88.6 or v3.116.0
Run page size check on .so files

repoLinks.description: PR #3096: Update Android NDK to r27c and update to 16kb alignment (main)

versionAnalysis.relevanceReason: The 16KB page alignment was added in PR #3096 and backported to v3.116.1. Versions 3.116.1+ include the fix.

fixStatus.reason: PR #3096 added -Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384 to extra_ldflags in native/android/build.cake and also updated libHarfBuzzSharp with the same flag. Backported to v3.116.1 via PR #3098.

analysis.summary: This issue reports that libSkiaSharp.so uses 4KB page alignment, which is incompatible with Android 16+ requirements. The fix was already implemented in PR #3096 (Dec 2024) by adding -Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384 to the linker flags. It was backported to v3.116.1 and v3.118.0-preview.2. The reporter appears to be on v2.88.6 or v3.116.0, both of which predate the fix.
analysis.rationale: Classified as type/bug since the native library lacked correct alignment for a platform requirement. The fix is confirmed in the build scripts with both libSkiaSharp and libHarfBuzzSharp receiving the 16KB page size flag. Issue #3025 was the original report, and #3419 is a near-duplicate filed the same day. Maintainer mattleibow already asked if the reporter tried 3.x, suggesting the fix path.

keySignals.text: Google Play now requires all 64-bit native libraries to use 16 KB memory page size starting with Android 16+
keySignals.interpretation: Valid compliance requirement from Google Play policy change.

keySignals.text: SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.Android v2.88.6 has a 4 KB page size
keySignals.interpretation: Reporter is on the unsupported 2.x series. The fix exists in 3.116.1+.

keySignals.text: Have you tried the 3.x series of SkiaSharp? The 2.x series is not really supported
keySignals.interpretation: Maintainer already directed reporter to the fixed version series.

codeInvestigation.finding: extra_ldflags includes '-Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384' for libSkiaSharp, confirming 16KB page alignment is set
LOCAL_LDFLAGS includes '-Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384' for libHarfBuzzSharp, confirming both native libs are aligned
APP_SUPPORT_FLEXIBLE_PAGE_SIZES set to true, further supporting Android 16KB page size compliance

workarounds: Upgrade to SkiaSharp v3.116.1 or later, which includes the 16KB page alignment fix

resolution.hypothesis: The native Android libraries in SkiaSharp < 3.116.1 were built with default 4KB page alignment. Android 16+ requires 16KB alignment for Google Play compliance.

proposals.title: Upgrade to SkiaSharp 3.116.1+
proposals.description: Upgrade to SkiaSharp v3.116.1 or later. PR #3096 added -Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384 to both libSkiaSharp.so and libHarfBuzzSharp.so linker flags, and this was backported to v3.116.1.

resolution.recommendedReason: The fix already exists in released versions. No code changes needed — just a package upgrade.

actionability.reason: The 16KB page alignment was fixed in PR #3096 and released in v3.116.1+. Reporter needs to upgrade from v2.88.6/v3.116.0.

actions.description: Inform reporter the fix exists in v3.116.1+
actions.comment:
Thanks for the report. This was addressed in PR #3096, which updated the Android NDK to r27c and added 16 KB page alignment (`-Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384`) to both `libSkiaSharp.so` and `libHarfBuzzSharp.so`. The fix was backported to v3.116.1 (PR #3098).

Upgrading to SkiaSharp **v3.116.1** or later should resolve the Google Play compliance issue. The 2.x series does not include this fix and is no longer actively supported.

The original tracking issue was #3025, and the related duplicate is #3419.
